basic_details.job_title: IWAI Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) has officially announced the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. IWAI-12/4/2022-Admn. Rectt. dated 10 July 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 56 years and hold an analogous post or have 5 years of service in LDC or equivalent post can submit their offline applications on or before 24 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Holding analogous post or 5 years service in LDC or equivalent
qualification.details: Officers holding analogous post OR with 5 years' service in the grade of LDC or equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iwai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.iwai.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment is 24 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the UDC post at IWAI?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post, candidates must be holding an analogous post or have at least 5 years of service in the grade of Lower Division Clerk (LDC) or an equivalent post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post is 56 years. There might be age relaxations applicable as per government norms, which can be checked in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the UDC position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post will be placed at Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) recommendations.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the UDC post?
faq.answer: Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) has announced a total of 6 vacancies for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) position through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the information available, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the UDC post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post in IWAI is based on deputation. This means eligible government employees will be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI), which is www.iwai.nic.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, which typically include a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
